text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-known textbook titled "Mining of Massive Datasets" (note the slight spelling difference from the cited "massive data sets") authored by Leskovec, Rajaraman, and Ullman. The cited reference corresponds to this standard academic textbook, which is widely available and maintained by the authors.

LINK: http://www.mmds.org/
FOUND_TITLE: Mining of Massive Datasets
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jure Leskovec, Anand Rajaraman, Jeffrey David Ullman
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
